title: The Preventers
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''The Preventers''' were a vocal minority group of [[Carosite]]s. They argued that their species should overcome their tradition pacifism and fight aggressively against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In this way, it was argued, more lives would be saved in the long run.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
*<!-- 1998-06-XX -->''[[Alien Encounters]]''
